_comment: Arduino CLI Backend — MCP Server Configuration (Remote Linux Container)
_description: Project runs on a TurnKey Linux container. Use HTTP/SSE transport for remote connection.

vs_code_roo_code._instructions: Add the 'arduino-cli' block inside the 'mcpServers' object. Uses HTTP transport — no local PHP needed.

antigravity_ide._instructions: Add as an HTTP/SSE MCP server in Antigravity MCP settings.

claude_desktop._instructions: Claude Desktop currently only supports STDIO transport. Use the mcp-proxy workaround below if you need Claude Desktop support.
claude_desktop._workaround: Install mcp-proxy: npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector and point it to the HTTP URL

generic_http._description: Any MCP client that supports HTTP/SSE transport
